param.name: robot_description
param.command: $(find xacro)/xacro $(arg urdf_xacro) gpu:=$(arg gpu) velodyne_visualize:=$(arg velodyne_visualize)

node.name: spawn_diff_bot_model
node.args: -x $(arg pose_initial_x) -y $(arg pose_initial_y) -z $(arg z) -Y $(arg pose_initial_theta) -unpause -urdf -param robot_description -model $(arg gazebo_model_name)
